description_long: This handcart features a robust, hexagonal cargo compartment with high side walls and a slightly tapered front, designed for secure transport of goods. The frame is primarily constructed from a sturdy material, likely painted metal, with a prominent red and white color scheme. Two large, spoked wheels are mounted on either side near the rear, providing stability and ease of movement. At the front, a dual-grip handlebar is attached to a black yoke, allowing for comfortable manual pulling or pushing. Decorative flags are mounted at the rear corners, adding a distinctive touch. The open-top design and recessed tray make it suitable for carrying a variety of items in urban environments.
description: A red and white handcart with a hexagonal cargo compartment, large spoked wheels, and a dual-grip handlebar for manual transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual-grip handlebar, black yoke, and the tapered front of the cargo compartment.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large spoked wheel, high side walls, and decorative rear flags.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cargo compartment and both wheels, with the handlebar visible in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the wheel, side rails, and rear flags.
attribute_load_platform_design: recessed tray with high side walls
